content: Phase 1: Install Python deps (google-api-python-client, google-auth, etc.) + write POC test script for Drive + SMTP
Phase 1: Run POC test until all integrations succeed (Drive folder create, streaming upload, Google Docs link, SMTP email)
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design_agent (kid-friendly contest landing page)
Phase 2: Replace CRA frontend with Next.js 14 (App Router) + Tailwind + i18n; configure package.json so supervisor `yarn start` runs Next.js
Phase 2: Build landing page sections (Hero, About, Prizes, How-to-join, Criteria, Form, Footer) with all content from info-content.md
Phase 2: Build language toggle + i18n strings (VI default, EN switch)
Phase 2: Build registration form with 6 songs (Upload OR Link toggle), progress bar, validation, consent checkbox
Phase 2: Implement FastAPI /api/register with streaming Drive upload + Google Docs creation + SMTP email
Phase 2: All user stories US1-US14 covered in development
Phase 3: End-to-end testing with testing_agent_v3 (backend curl + frontend Playwright); fix all bugs
Phase 4: Final polish, replace robot-mascot placeholder when uploaded, deliver
